error_signature: Webhook URLs showing up incorrectly with extra /webhook
title: Incorrect Webhook URL configuration causing extra '/webhook'
symptom: Webhook and form URLs are generated with an extra '/webhook', causing issues with form submissions. The submit button keeps spinning instead of showing the final message.
not_this_if: WEBHOOK_URL is correctly configured without trailing '/webhook'
root_cause: The WEBHOOK_URL environment variable is incorrectly set with a trailing '/webhook', leading to malformed URLs in the webhook and form nodes. This misconfiguration causes the backend to attempt to access incorrect URLs, resulting in failures during form submissions.
fix_steps: Access the Portainer interface where n8n is running.
Locate the WEBHOOK_URL environment variable in the n8n service settings.
Remove the trailing '/webhook' from the WEBHOOK_URL.
Restart the n8n service to apply the changes.
agent_instruction: Remove the trailing '/webhook' from the WEBHOOK_URL and restart the n8n service.
